triage.likely_cause: Unknown — no customer identifier, service name, error message, or stack trace provided; payment failure source cannot be determined
recommended_actions: Identify the affected customer and scope: is this all customers, one tenant, or a single user? Check payment-service error rate on /checkout in the monitoring dashboard
Check payment-service logs for NullPointerException at PaymentService.java:142 — this is the known unfixed NPE from the guest checkout flow (see PROD-4521/PROD-4487)
Verify Stripe status at status.stripe.com to rule out upstream payment processor failure
Provide customer name/ID, error messages, or a stack trace so this incident can be escalated or re-triaged accurately
triage.reasoning: No deploy within 60 minutes of the incident open time (2026-06-17T22:12:51Z) — all entries in deploys/recent.json are from late May 2026. The report 'customer cannot pay' is the closest symptom match to the payment-service-degraded runbook, but without a customer name, error code, or stack trace the blast radius is unknown. Two existing unresolved incidents (PROD-4521, PROD-4487) involve the same payment flow — the guest checkout NPE at PaymentService.java:142 — so this report may be a recurrence of those root causes. Assigned P2 pending scope clarification; escalate to P0 or P1 if monitoring confirms broad payment failure.
